mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT
ROUND(avg(IO_STAT),2) as avgIoStat
ROUND(avg(RD_REQ_PS + WR_REQ_PS),2) as avgReqps
FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT io WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN_ID=${domainId} AND io.DEV_NAME in (${devNames})

select
MAX(RD_LATENCY) as rdLatency,
MAX(WR_LATENCY) as wrLatency,
MAX(WR_REQ_PS) as wrReqps,
MAX(RD_REQ_PS) as rdReqps,
MAX(IO_STAT) as ioStat,
DOMAIN_ID as domainId FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT WHERE TIME=(SELECT MAX(TIME)- ${duration} FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT)
AND HOST_POOL_ID =${hostPoolId}
AND CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
AND HOST_ID =${hostId}
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID
ORDER BY rdLatency DESC
ORDER BY wrLatency DESC
ORDER BY wrReqps DESC
ORDER BY rdReqps DESC
ORDER BY ioStat DESC
LIMIT 0,${limit}

SELECT io.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, ROUND(avg(io.UTILIZATION),2) as utilization FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT io WHERE io.TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME)- ${duration} FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT)
AND io.CLUSTER_ID IN (${clusterIds})
AND io.DOMAIN_ID IN (${vmIds})
AND io.HOST_ID IN (${hostIds})
AND io.OP_GROUP_CODE LIKE #{operatorGroupCode}
GROUP BY io.DOMAIN_ID LIMIT 5

select DOMAIN_ID as domainId, title, DEV_NAME as devName,
max(avgReqps) avgReqps
max(avgLatency) avgLatency
from (select tb1.DOMAIN_ID, tb2.title, tb1.DEV_NAME,
ROUND(avg(tb1.RD_REQ_PS + tb1.WR_REQ_PS),2) avgReqps
ROUND(avg(tb1.RD_LATENCY + tb1.WR_LATENCY),2) avgLatency
from TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT tb1 join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} tb2 on tb1.DOMAIN_ID=tb2.id WHERE tb1.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} and tb2.enable=1
and tb2.op_group_code LIKE #{operatorGroupCode}
group by tb1.DOMAIN_ID, tb2.title, tb1.DEV_NAME) tb3 group by DOMAIN_ID,title,DEV_NAME
order by avgReqps desc
order by avgLatency desc
limit 5

select tb1.DOMAIN_ID as domainId, tb2.title as title, tb1.DEV_NAME as devName, tb1.TIME as time,
tb1.RD_REQ_PS + tb1.WR_REQ_PS as reqps
tb1.RD_LATENCY + tb1.WR_LATENCY as latency
from TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT tb1 join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} tb2 on tb1.DOMAIN_ID=tb2.id WHERE tb1.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} order by tb1.DOMAIN_ID, tb1.TIME asc

select b.uuid as uuid, a.DEV_NAME as devName, a.TIME as time, a.SIZE as size, a.UTILIZATION as utilization from (select TIME, DOMAIN_ID, DEV_NAME, UTILIZATION, SIZE from TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT where TIME between ${startTime} and ${endTime} and CLUSTER_ID = ${clusterId}) as a join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} as b on a.DOMAIN_ID=b.id order by uuid, devName, time

SELECT DEV_NAME as devName, UTILIZATION as utilization, SIZE as size FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT t WHERE DOMAIN_ID=${domainId} AND t.TIME= ( SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_DOMAIN_IO_STAT WHERE DOMAIN_ID=${domainId})
